conclusion: Current c8 correctness-first rowchunk2/selected-c1 path now has repo-relative baseline references and a captured rocprofv3 kernel trace attached to a 512/128 retained-bench rerun. Generated-token equality remains [137,137,137,137,137,137,137,137], primitive correctness is loaded/passed, and profiler provenance/kernel-duration blockers are absent. This is not a throughput claim: c8 still blocks on rowchunked full attention/native_caware_decode=false, selected-c1 MoE retained metadata, and row-GEMV projection dispatch/no accepted current c-aware evidence.
